name: Qualifying Advanced Coal Project Credit

eligibility.description: Requires certification from the Secretary of the Treasury and Energy. Project must use advanced coal-based technology, be located in the US, and meet specific capacity and emission standards.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a tax credit of 15%, 20%, or 30% of the qualified investment in advanced coal-based generation technology projects.
